arts.ttl: Carsley: Haven't applied for full-time England job
arts.sum: England interim manager Lee Carsley said he had not made a formal application to become their permanent boss and added that he felt privileged to be given the opportunity to manage the senior side.

arts.ttl: 4 ways to fix England's muddled attack
arts.sum: Even if these probing runs are not always picked out, the threat of a Premier League forward hurtling towards goal will naturally push Finland's backline deeper, teasing apart space in midfield which was so hard to come by against Greece. The Birmingham-born former Republic of Ireland international claimed that he was 'hopeful' of returning to the Under-21s before, a few seconds of garbled sentences later, describing the senior management role as "one of the best jobs in the world".
